resources.string: Hello, I\'m Hanafu\nyour AI emotional companion
Are you sure you want to clear all chat history? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Tap + to start a new chat
Are you sure you want to save the character settings?
Describe the character\'s personality and speaking style
First message the AI sends in a new conversation

1.1 Hanafu (hereinafter referred to as "the Software") is an AI emotional companion application. By using this Software, you agree to be bound by the terms of this Agreement. 1.2 The Software reserves the right to modify this Agreement at any time. Modified terms will take effect immediately upon publication.

2.1 The Software provides AI-powered conversational services. 2.2 The Software uses a network-based service model. Service quality may be affected by your network environment. 2.3 The Software reserves the right to adjust, suspend, or terminate services as needed.

3.1 You agree not to use the Software for any illegal purposes. 3.2 You shall not attempt to reverse engineer, decompile, or tamper with the Software. 3.3 You shall not send spam, harass others, or spread malicious content through the Software.

4.1 By default, the Software stores your conversation data locally on your device. 4.2 Your conversations are sent to the AI service provider for processing. We recommend not sharing sensitive personal information. 4.3 The Software does not collect your personal data for commercial purposes.

5.1 The Software is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranty. 5.2 The Software is not liable for any losses arising from the use or inability to use the Software. 5.3 AI-generated content is for reference only and does not represent the views of the Software.
6.1 The code, design, and brand of the Software are protected by intellectual property laws. 6.2 You may not copy, modify, or redistribute the Software without authorization.

7.1 This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and the Software regarding your use of the Software. 7.2 If any provision of this Agreement is found to be invalid, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
I have read and agree to the terms above
Please scroll to read the full agreement
